headline: JLL CEO says growth is now uncertain in the Middle East
summary: JLL has a major footprint in the Middle East, managing and leasing properties in Dubai and Abu Dhabi in the United Arab Emirates and in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Jones Lang LaSalle, CBRE Group and Cushman & Wakefield
summary: Jones Lang LaSalle, CBRE and Cushman & Wakefield stand out as outsourcing trends and workplace transformation fuel growth despite real estate headwinds.
